The '''Sith Tremor Sword''' was a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] very similar to the ones used by [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] from the [[Golden Age of the Sith]], specifically the ancient Sith Lords of [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]].<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide" /> It was awarded to [[masterblade]]s, members of the [[Bladeborn]] who had killed at least ten [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]-wielding opponents in battle. The metal blade was laced with the rare mineral [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] to prevent it from being severed in lightsaber sparring.<ref name="KOTOR 2 Prima Official Guide" />
